aeo_readiness.summary: While J&N HVAC has a solid foundation with good reviews and contact options, AI assistants are unlikely to cite them due to missing schema markup and insufficient conversational content.
quick_wins: Add FAQ schema to address common HVAC queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a 5-star rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No engagement in the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to prevent future discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of schema markup prevents AI from identifying them as a structured, authoritative source.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair in Chandler, AZ' and 'trusted HVAC services'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema to provide AI with structured data.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, awards, and detailed service explanations to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top choice for HVAC queries.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with schema markup and conversational content rank higher in AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates schema markup, GBP optimization, and authority-building content to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your business.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; act now to avoid losing market share.

email_subject_line: Boost Your HVAC Business with AI-Ready Optimization
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your business stand out in AI search results.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can enhance your AI visibility and attract more customers.
